label: Add Global Variant Comment
description: The user is allowed to add a new comment for the variant in global scope

label: Add Sample Comment
description: The user is allowed to add a new comment for the report/sample in sample view

label: Add Variant Comment
description: The user is allowed to add a new comment for the variant

label: Apply Variant Filters
description: Can apply variant filters within assigned groups.

label: Assign Variant Tier
description: Allows assigning or modifying the tier classification of variants for prioritization and reporting.

label: Create ASP
description: Allows creation of a new assay specific panel.

label: Create ASP Configurations
description: Allows creating new assay configurations.

label: Create ISGL
description: Allows creation of new in-silico genelists.

label: Create Permission Policy
description: Allows creation of new permission policies in the system.

label: Create Report
description: Allows user to create report and save it.

label: Create Role
description: Allows createing of user roles.

label: Create Schema
description: Allows creating new schemas

label: Create User
description: Allows adding new users.

label: Delete ASP
description: Allows deletion of any assay specific panel.

label: Delete ASP Configurations
description: Delete Assay Configurations

label: Delete ISGL
description: Allows deletion of any in-silico genelist.

label: Delete Permission Policy
description: Allows deletion of permission policies from the system

label: Delete Role
description: Allows deleteing of user roles

label: Delete Any Sample
description: Allows deletion of any sample in the system.

label: Delete Schema
description: Allows deleting schemas

label: Delete User
description: Allows removing users from the system.

label: Download CNVs
description: Allows the user to download CNV data.

label: Download Fusions
description: Allows the user to download fusion event data

label: Download Low Cov
description: Allows the user to download Low Coverage data.

label: Download PGx
description: Allows the user to download pharmacogenomics results.

label: Download SNVs
description: Allows the user to download snv data.

label: Download Translocations
description: Allows the user to download translocation variant data.

label: Edit ASP
description: Allows editing existing assay specific panels.

label: Edit ASP Configurations
description: Allows modifying existing assay configurations.

label: Edit ISGL
description: Allows editing of existing in-silico genelists.

label: Edit Permission Policy
description: Allows editing of existing permission policy definitions

label: Edit Role
description: Allows editing of user roles.

label: Edit Sample
description: Person can edit the sample

label: Edit All Samples
description: Allows editing any sample regardless of group

label: Edit Schema
description: Allows editing existing schemas

label: Edit User
description: Allows editing user information.

label: Edit User Groups
description: Allows, modifying the user groups limited to the operator groups

label: Edit User Roles
description: Allows updating the role of any user upto the operator's role.

label: Hide Sample Comment
description: The user is allowed to hide a sample comment from the sample view.

label: Hide Variant Comment
description: The user is allowed to hide a variant comment which could be for a variant, cnv, fusion, or any other variant type.

label: Manage CNVs
description: Allows the user to view and modify CNV data for analysis.

label: Manage Fusions
description: Allows the user to view and annotate fusion events for analysis.

label: Manage PGx
description: Allows the user to view and manage pharmacogenomics results.

label: Manage SNVs
description: Allows user to view and modify SNV variant data for analysis.

label: Manage Translocations
description: Allows the user to view and annotate structural translocations.

label: Manage User
description: Full control over user creation, editing, and deletion.

label: Modify Assigned Tier
description: Allows editing or changing the assigned tier of a variant within the user's group or assigned samples.

label: Preview Report
description: Allows user to preview report before saving it.

label: Remove Assigned Tier
description: Allows removal of tier classification from variants within the user's accessible group or samples.

label: Remove Any Tier (Global)
description: Grants permission to remove tier classifications from any variant across all samples and groups.

label: Unhide Sample Comment
description: The user is allowed to unhide a sample comment from the sample view.

label: Unhide Variant Comment
description: The user is allowed to unhide a variant comment which could be for a variant, cnv, fusion, or any other variant type.

label: View ASP
description: Allows viewing any assay specific panel in the system.

label: View ASP Configurations
description: Allows viewing assay configurations.

label: View Audit Logs
description: Allows viewing application-wide audit logs.

label: View Gene Annotations
description: Allows the user to view all the variants that were tired for a specific gene.

label: Access IGV Viewer
description: Allows launching and accessing IGV genome viewer.

label: View ISGL
description: Allows viewing of any in-silico genelist.

label: View Permission Policy
description: Allows viewing of permission policies from the system.

label: View Reports
description: Can view Reports but not edit or download

label: View Role
description: Allows viewing of user roles.

label: View All Samples
description: Allows viewing all samples regardless of group.

label: View Schema
description: Allows viewing of configuration schemas.

label: View User
description: Allows viewing the list of users.
